narratives.Overview: Implement the remark-lint-mermaid plugin in packages/plugin-mermaid. Visits all code nodes with lang='mermaid', validates the node value using @mermaid-js/parser, and maps parse errors to LintViolation objects with accurate position data. Covers FR-3.

items.title: remarkLintMermaid plugin implemented using unified-lint-rule and unist-util-visit
Each code block value passed to @mermaid-js/parser; parse errors mapped to lint violations with node.position line/column
Valid Mermaid blocks produce zero violations
Plugin exported from packages/plugin-mermaid and registerable via marky.config.ts plugins array
Unit tests cover: valid flowchart passes, invalid syntax produces violation with correct line/col, non-mermaid code blocks are ignored, empty mermaid block is handled gracefully
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for packages/plugin-mermaid
